name: Simple One-Loaf Barley Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first five ingredients together and let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Stir down and let stand for an additional 15 minutes.
3. Add the oil and flour, then knead for 3 minutes.
4. Shape into a loaf and let rise in the pan until doubled in size.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. This bread is somewhat flat but very tasty.
